MOBY DICK â†’ m/b/pâ†’B; vowelsâ†’U; yâ†’U; d/t/nâ†’D; c/k/q/gâ†’G. Hence BUBU DUGG.
The Duw form BUBU DUGG can also map back to BABY DUCK (a young bird), showing the ambiguity.
MINUTE maps to BUDUDU. BANANA also maps to BUDUDU, so one friend brought a fruit: BANANA.
MINUTE â†’ BUDUDU also matches POTATO â†’ BUDUDU, so the vegetable was POTATO.
